response.justification: The candidate has extensive software development experience, strong proficiency in C/C++ and embedded system work, and a track record of contributing to open-source projects. However, there is no explicit mention of Linux kernel source-code modification, networking expertise (Layer 2/3, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), or Japanese language proficiency. The resume also lacks direct experience with embedded networking products or security technologies like encryption and authentication systems.
strengths: Strong background in embedded systems and C/C++ development
Experience with open-source projects and hardware-software integration
Proven ability to work across the full stack and adapt to new technologies
concerns: No clear evidence of Linux kernel modification or networking expertise
Limited direct experience with security features for embedded networking products
